title: AWeber vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: AWeber vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between AWeber and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. AWeber is built for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. AWeber wins for bloggers and solopreneurs wanting simplicity, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, AWeber or Flodesk?
faq.a: AWeber starts at a lower price point ($15/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to AWeber?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to AWeber is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
